recommendations: During implement, derive enum value/label maps directly from ir/inventory.json option_set.value entries to prevent label drift.
Extend ENUM-02 ir_refs with answer-pair and stability sets before implement if AUTH-05 onboarding health/load steps need per-set traceability.
Export all enum modules through frontend/src/domain/enums/index.ts with stable slug keys for router and tab consumers.

critiques.finding: ENUM-02 scope and AC-2 promise customer_alignment_*, customer_performance_*, customer_stability_*, and customers_load_signal_* pairs, but ir_refs lists only three question sets plus customers_load_signal_os — omitting customer_stability_question_os, customer_stability_answer_os, answer-pair sets, customer_health_question_os, and customer_orientation_answer_os present in ir/inventory.json.
critiques.alternative: Add explicit ir_refs for each onboarding question/answer option set used by AUTH-04/AUTH-05, or split ENUM-02 into profile vs health/load-signal items mirroring AUTH item boundaries.

critiques.finding: Item scopes state frontend migration work but do not explicitly exclude adapter routes or project/supabase writes; low risk for a pure enum module but weak out-of-scope boundaries per checklist.
critiques.alternative: Add one-line out-of-scope clause per item: no adapter routes, no project/ mutations, read-only Supabase reference only.

evidence: ENUM-02 and ENUM-03 depend_on ENUM-01 only
4 items for 12 module-map ir_roots at estimated_size medium
Domain grouping: navigation, onboarding Q&A, path/coaching/state, tier
All items scope frontend enum migration with target_files under frontend/src/domain/enums/
criteria_audit.gap: Explicit out-of-scope lines for adapter and project/ not stated

evidence: ACs reference ir/inventory.json display strings and value counts
3 ACs per item; proportional to option-set bulk (no UI data-bubble-id padding)
Module is domain enum migration; no UI layout items in decompose artifact
Distinct ir_ref partitions across ENUM-01 through ENUM-04
ir_refs map to option_set ids in ir/inventory.json
